statement.en: YASHIL IQTISODIYOTGA O'TISH SHAROITIDA KORXONALARNING EKOLOGIK INNOVATSION LOYIHALARINI MOLIYALASHTIRISHDA INVESTITSIYA MEXANIZMLARINI TAKOMILLASHTIRISH
statement.summary: Mazkur maqolada yashil iqtisodiyotga o‘tish sharoitida korxonalarning ekologik innovatsion loyihalarini moliyalashtirishda investitsiya mexanizmlarini takomillashtirish masalalari tadqiq etilgan. Tadqiqot jarayonida yashil iqtisodiyotning nazariy asoslari, ekologik innovatsion loyihalarning xususiyatlari hamda ularni moliyalashtirishning zamonaviy usullari tahlil qilingan. Shuningdek, xorijiy va milliy tajriba asosida investitsiya mexanizmlarining samaradorligi baholangan. Natijada ekologik loyihalarni moliyalashtirishda moliyaviy manbalarni diversifikatsiya qilish, davlat qo‘llab-quvvatlash choralarini kuchaytirish va innovatsion faoliyatni rag‘batlantirish zarurligi asoslab berilgan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The paper presents policy recommendations and investment mechanism improvements for green economy transition financing. These are prescriptive/normative propositions under active development in policy domains, not established facts. The research synthesizes existing theory and comparative cases but proposes improvements requiring validation through implementation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 緑の経済への移行は、複数の資金源と生態的革新の相乗効果によって非線形に加速する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 資金の流れが中心の革新から四方へ放射し、生態系のリズムで共鳴する。
